title: Looking for Teacher at upGrad Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at upGrad Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? upGrad Asia Pacific Associates in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About upGrad Asia Pacific Associates:
upGrad Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with upGrad Asia Pacific Associates!
